title: Enchanting Overhauled
description: Enhances the enchanting experience found in Minecraft!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2432f94dc62d9b66e6cc6f9f228ba0cdb2b2a6bc.png)

Enchanting Overhauled updates Minecraft's enchanting system with new structures, items and mechanics! Most notably, the Enchanting table has been completely revamped!

 ![Enchanted Tomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d723990392a54f96a12aa17837f17e2e2a323e6.png)
Details - **Enchanted Tomes** are a new type of enchantment container, much more powerful than **Enchanted Books**. - Unlike **Enchanted Books**, **Enchanted Tomes** are persistent and not consumed on use. - They also contain much stronger and more numerous enchantments than their book counterparts. - Such vast power and utility cannot be crafted by mere mortal hands, thus finding an **Enchanted Tome** can prove to be quite the adventure!
![Enchanting Altars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c348022074c301e8249f5494cd60294fcc84f310.png)
Details - The default **Enchanting Table** has been removed and replaced by the **Enchanting Altar**. - **Enchanting Altars** come in 3 flavors: **Deactivated**, **Disturbed** and **Activated**. - Access the new **Enchant Menu** by interacting with an **Activated Enchanting Altar**. - The new **Enchant Menu** allows you to upgrade, transfer and apply new enchantments to your tools and armor. - Don't like the enchantment selection the **Enchant Menu** presents you with? Just **Turn a Page** over!
![Enchantment Themes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba9a0037b0cb63b58d6a9760908e2b537c0e6b07.png)
Details - Some spells cannot be uttered infront of an **Enchanting Altar**, not without the right source of **Power**, that is. - Introducing **Enchantment Themes**: some enchantments have been lost to the sages of the overworld and must be rediscovered. - Perhaps artifacts from other worlds can feed the arcane hunger of the **Enchanting Altar** and allow it to touch other kinds of magic?
![Library Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9ae1624ea19cc935c9d00af887c26a207a9f540.png)
Details - **Archeologists** have discovered a new structure, long thought lost or mere myth, in the overworld. - Join them and discover what secrets are kept within the once pristine halls of the **Ancient Libraries**!
![Level Curve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833b2b6fd7c81a4582df4a6222415a91239db9b4.png)
Details - A shift in the astral plane has bestowed a boon of clarity on the inhabitants of the overworld. - With their minds sharper, learning has never been easier, reach your full potential faster and **pour your soul** into your tools!
![Mundane Anvils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b0a553411b9d3fd1905caf524bc3a73588c394c.png)
Details - The banishment of the **Enchanting Table** has also affected the **Anvil** and cut its ties to the arcane! - The **Anvil** no longer requires XP to be used, as it always should have been! - However, **Enchanted Books** can no longer be used on the **Anvil**, thus gone are the days of hammering your books!
![Various Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e0829dff26bd37fcd276d04114cea9617eed057.png)
Details - The new astral clarity has revealed a fundamental truth: arcane matrices become unstable with too much power! **Items** can now only sustain **3 enchantments** (though curses, as always, find their own way to stick around). - After much debate, the Conclave of Enchanters has voted to rename "**Bane of Arthropods**." The spell is now known by the more direct (and satisfying) name: **Extermination**. - Arcane power has been concentrated! **All leveled enchantments** now reach their full potential at **Level III**. - As a glorious consequence, **Sharpness**, **Smite**, **Extermination**, and **Efficiency** now feel much more potent at each step! - The Protection enchantment has been sundered into two distinct spells: some sort of "**Physical Protection**" and a spell which could best be described as "**Magic Protection**"! - Such powerful defensive magics must be anchored to the body's core! All **Protection-type** enchantments may now only be applied to **Chestplates**. - The ancient paradox has been solved! Sages have finally figured out how to create an **Infinite** supply of **Flaming arrows**. - Why shoot one piercing bolt when you can shoot three? **Multishot** and **Piercing** have set aside their differences. - Enchanters have brokered peace between the warring magics of water-walking and water-swimming. **Depth Strider** and **Frost Walker** can now coexist on the same pair of boots. - The Enchanting Altar does not discriminate, all tools are considered sharp weapons, and as such now support Damage increasing enchantments. - The **Frost Walker** incantation has been strengthened, allowing its user to confidently tread upon the treacherous surface of Powdered Snow. - It seems **Aqua Affinity** was always meant to attune the whole body. It now clears the murky depths from your vision, granting perfect **clarity** while submerged. - The enchantments themselves are eager to be understood! All spells now provide a handy **description** in their tooltip, though try not to read between the lines, we don't truly know what we're messing with. - Added a new **Advancement** for activating an **Enchanting Altar**.
![Config Reloaded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/610f191e77a8ef0631c4df967d3c152c512578d0.png)
Details - Don't like the mod defaults? Change them in **config/enchanting_overhauled.properties**! - Don't like editing your config manually? Configure Enchanting Overhauled in [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or NeoForge's Config Editor! - Configuring becomes tedious fast? Certainly not with **/reload** !
![Developer API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6abf07c2d91ab4f340f5effb48f5274892a3865.png)
Details - Are you a mod or modpack dev and would like introduce compatibility? Enchanting Overhauled now features a data driven API! Add new enchantment themes, assign themes to other enchantments, add or change enchantment descriptions, all without a single line of java code!
![Acknowledgements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddd09f3106001598dd98f188e99de26d19de0f6e.png)
Details - The isometric renders were made using [glisco](https://modrinth.com/user/glisco)'s [Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders) mod. - The fabric config file is managed by a modified version of [magistermaks](https://modrinth.com/user/magistermaks) [simple-config](https://github.com/magistermaks/fabric-simplelibs/tree/master/simple-config). - Versions 2.0.1+ were created using [jaredlll08](https://modrinth.com/user/jaredlll08)'s [MultiLoader-Template](https://github.com/jaredlll08/MultiLoader-Template).
